_note: Covers the full request path from ServeHTTP through route matching (radix tree) to handler execution. Engine.handleHTTPRequest does path lookup; RouterGroup.Handle and Engine.addRoute register routes; Engine.Use adds middleware; RouterGroup.Group creates sub-groups; HandlerFunc/HandlersChain are the handler types; Context.Next drives the middleware chain; node.getValue performs radix tree matching. Verified by grep at d3ffc99.
